fields.label: Availability Exclusion Rules
fields.description: Control which bed statuses are excluded from the available bed count and the Live Bed Board.

fields.label: Exclude Dirty Beds
fields.description: Vacant beds with housekeeping status 'Dirty' will not appear as available.

fields.label: Exclude Beds Being Cleaned
fields.description: Vacant beds with housekeeping status 'In Progress' will not appear as available.

fields.label: Exclude Maintenance-Hold Beds
fields.description: Beds under maintenance hold will not appear as available.

fields.label: Exclude Infection-Blocked Beds
fields.description: Beds with an active infection block will not appear as available.

fields.label: Gender Enforcement
fields.description: Strict: hard-filter beds by gender restriction. Advisory: show warning but include. Ignore: no gender filtering.

fields.label: Cleaning Turnaround SLA (Minutes)
fields.description: Expected turnaround time for housekeeping after a bed is vacated.

fields.label: Auto-Mark Dirty on Discharge
fields.description: Automatically set housekeeping status to 'Dirty' when a bed is vacated.

fields.label: Cleaning SLA Multipliers
fields.description: Multipliers applied to the base cleaning SLA for special cleaning types.

fields.label: Deep Clean SLA Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplied against the base cleaning SLA for deep-clean tasks (e.g. 2.0 = 2x the base time).

fields.label: Isolation Clean SLA Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplied against the base cleaning SLA for isolation-clean tasks.

fields.label: Reservation Timeout (Minutes)
fields.description: How long a bed reservation holds before auto-release. Used by future bed allocation workflows.

fields.label: Enforce Payer Eligibility
fields.description: Strict: hide beds without a tariff for the selected payer. Advisory: flag but still show. Ignore: no payer filtering.

fields.label: Enforce Eligibility Verification
fields.description: Strict: block admission without verified eligibility for non-Cash payers. Advisory: warn but allow. Ignore: no eligibility check at admission.

fields.label: Minimum Buffer Beds per Ward
fields.description: Minimum beds to keep unallocated per ward for emergency use. Used by future allocation workflows.
